prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock **EDV (Eaton M62) supercharger** on the **2.4L EDV (Chrysler PT) turbocharged inline-4 (engine code: EDV)** with a **Garrett GT3076R .63 A/R turbo** paired with a **Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate** and a **custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe** featuring a **V-band clamp** for optimized exhaust flow. Retain the stock **2.4L forged crankshaft** but upgrade to **Manley H-beam connecting rods** and **JE 8.5:1 compression forged pistons** for 35 psi boost capability.

Fuel System: Swap the stock **Siemens-Deka 60 lb/hr injectors** for **ID1000x 1000cc injectors** and pair with a **Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump**. Install a **Radium Engineering dual catch can** to prevent oil buildup in the intake tract, and integrate a **Hondata K-Pro ECU** with a **custom AEM 3.5 bar MAP sensor** for precise boost control and ignition timing adjustments.

Drivetrain: Replace the stock **Tremec T-850 5-speed transmission** with a **Getrag 238 6-speed from the Dodge Caliber SRT-4**, reinforced with a **Spec Stage 3+ clutch** and **South Bend twin-disc flywheel**. Upgrade the **8.25-inch Chrysler 7.25 ring gear differential** to a **Quaife ATB helical LSD** with **Motive Gear 4.10:1 ring and pinion** for improved acceleration and traction.

Suspension: Install **KW Clubsport coilovers (8-position adjustable damping)** with **polyurethane bushings** and **Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear)**. Replace the stock **MacPherson struts** with **Bilstein B16 PSS10 dampers** and **Eibach Pro-Kit lowering springs** for a 1.5-inch drop. Add **Energy Suspension polyurethane control arm bushings** to reduce flex under hard cornering.

Braking: Upgrade to **Brembo GT 4-piston calipers** with **330mm two-piece rotors** (front) and **2-piston calipers with 300mm rotors** (rear), paired with **Hawk HT-10 brake pads** and **Goodridge stainless steel brake lines**. Retain the stock **ABS system** but recalibrate it via **HP Tuners** for aggressive brake bias tuning.
estetica: Aero: Install a **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** with **carbon fiber front canards**, **custom 3D-printed rear diffuser**, and **Seibon carbon fiber hood** featuring a **functional ram-air scoop** aligned with the **Garrett GT3076R turbo inlet**. Add a **Voltex Type-3 rear wing** with **adjustable carbon fiber endplates** for downforce tuning.

Exterior: Replace the stock **17x6-inch wheels** with **Enkei PF05 17x9 +35 (front) and 17x10 +35 (rear)** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear)**. Paint the body in **PPG Concept Black** with **3M Matte Black vinyl wrap accents** on the roof and mirrors. Add **VLED 7-inch halo headlights** with **Morimoto HID projectors** and **custom LED taillight overlays** for a modernized look.

Interior: Replace the stock seats with **Recaro SPG XL bucket seats** mounted on **Corbeau GT II seat rails**, paired with a **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel** and **Takata 4-point harnesses**. Install a **Defi BF gauge cluster** with **oil pressure, boost, and wideband AFR readouts**, and add **Soundstream REF-9.1000D 1000W amplifier** with **Focal Utopia Be 6.5-inch component speakers** for high-fidelity audio. Replace the stock shift knob with a **B&M Ripper short-throw shifter** and **custom aluminum shift boot** in **anodized red**.
